title: Transformer Benchmark Study
abstract: We introduce a transformer model and report strong accuracy gains.
full_text:
Introduction
A benchmark-oriented study.
Method
Our model uses transformer layers. Learning rate 1e-4, batch size 32, epochs 10.
Results
Accuracy reaches 92.1 on test split.
Conclusion
The method is effective.

title: Graph Neural Ranking
abstract: We propose a graph neural ranking model.
full_text:
Background
We study retrieval ranking.
Method
A graph neural network encoder is trained with learning rate 0.0005 and batch size 64.
Evaluation
AUC improves to 0.89.
Conclusion
The method generalizes.

title: Convolutional Retrieval Model
abstract: A convolutional architecture for retrieval tasks.
full_text:
1 Introduction
Task setup.
2 Methodology
A convolution encoder with lr=0.001 and epochs 12.
3 Results
MRR reaches 0.71 in our experiments.
4 Future Work
Analyze robustness.
